title: National Workforce Programme: prospectus
body: "The National Workforce Programme (NWP) is a programme to strengthen and support the capacity, capability and career pathway opportunities for the homelessness and rough sleeping sector’s workforce.  The NWP is a national grant over the next 3 years, which will support the essential work of the local authority, voluntary and community sectors.  We are making available a grant programme delivered through 4 individually biddable thematic funding streams, referred to as ‘pillars’, which will be managed through agreed workplans and regular monitoring. Bidders are welcome to apply for multiple pillars and partnership bids are encouraged. "
